# Loyally

  <div class="bld-hero__logo">
    <img src="../../img/loyally-logo.png" alt="Loyally">
  </div>

## About Loyally

> "Our mission is to support customer service worldwide by giving them the right data at the right time. The help desk employee can help any customer quickly and easily because all systems and data are linked. We combine the strengths of the customer service systems by presenting customer information with one click in one screen. Easy, time-saving and cost-effective."
>
> — Jan Smulders, CEO

Loyally builds and maintains multiple App Connect connectors, with deep expertise in customer service platforms. All connectors include a free 30-day trial and are priced at $12 per user per month.

## Connectors

Loyally currently supports the following App Connect connectors. [Contact Loyally](#contact-loyally) to ask about additional CRMs.

!!! tip "Free 30-day trial"
    All Loyally connectors include a free 30-day trial. No credit card required to get started.

## Contact Loyally

Reach out to discuss your CRM needs, request a trial, or ask about building support for a CRM not yet on Loyally's list.
